subject: Project pulse: poodle execution in Paris | Albert Einstein | Q3 review | INIT-9805
body: Team, we are aligning the next phase of poodle work in Paris. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Reference profile: Albert Einstein. Reference initiative INIT-9805. Maintain discretion until the kangaroo, koala, and drop bear urban encroachment assessment is complete. Tracking tags: quality, quality.
